target.title: fix(feishu): preserve root_id thread routing without thread_id forcing
target.body:
## Summary
- Preserve Feishu/Lark group topic anchoring by treating root_id as authoritative only for group reply routing.
- Let thread_id-only group contexts honor replyInThread config instead of forcing reply_in_thread.
- Preserve p2p/DM quote behavior by not forcing reply_in_thread solely because rootId is present outside group surfaces.

## Credit
Based on and credits @futuremind2026's work in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/40147. Related semantics discussion: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/39507. The typing-reaction target fix in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67783 is separate and intentionally out of scope.

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm exec vitest extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts --run

## Changelog
- Add a user-facing Feishu/Lark bugfix entry if the repo requires one for extension behavior changes.

ProjectClownfish replacement details:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-157004-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/40147
- Credit: Credit @futuremind2026 for the source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/40147 and preserve attribution in the replacement PR body and changelog note.; Mention #39507/@Larry-Labs as related replyInThread semantics context, but do not supersede it unless maintainers choose disabled-as-hard-off semantics.; Keep #67783/@huiwen01 out of scope; it is a distinct typing-reaction target fix with its own review path.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed; pnpm exec vitest extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts --run
